# Dylan Fox — Freelance Web Developer

Dylan Fox is a freelance web developer based in Kansas City, MO.
He builds fast, well-crafted websites for small businesses and nonprofits — clean code, thoughtful design, no bloat.

## Background

- BS in CSIT, Data Science, and Mathematics from Graceland University (2021)
- MS in Data Science & Analytics (2023)
- 5+ years of professional web development experience
- Previously: Analytics Development at Evolytics, Data Science at Honeywell FM&T
- Currently: Pursuing MDiv at Midwestern Baptist Theological Seminary; Pastoral Assistant

## Services

- **Website Development** — JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js
- **Analytics Implementation** — Clickstream analytics, data collection strategy (clients include Realtor.com, Highrises.com, Athome.com)
- **Data Science & Analytics** — Graph neural network research, enterprise data science

## Contact

- Email: dylan@dylanfox.net
- Website: https://dylanfox.net
- GitHub: https://github.com/dylanfox5

## Writing

Dylan writes about faith, technology, and life at https://dylanfox.net/blog
